BEYOND TIME. BEYOND TRADITION.

Scroll to Assemble Calibre

PHILOSOPHY

A Legacy Built by Hand. For Generations.

AETERNA is an independent Swiss watch manufacture, creating exclusive mechanical timepieces in strictly limited series for collectors and connoisseurs of haute horlogerie.

Each timepiece is hand-assembled by master watchmakers who undergo years of training in traditional methods. With production limited to only 300 calibres a year, every instrument is not just a tool for measuring time, but a masterpiece of sculpture and mechanics.

"True luxury is not about immediate attention. It is about objects built to outlast us, preserving accuracy and beauty across generations."

THE CALIBRE

Micro-Mechanics in Motion

01

The Mechanical Heart

The balance wheel oscillates at 28,800 vibrations per hour (4Hz). Programmed to maintain an unyielding rate, it dictates the pulse of the watch, counteracting gravitational forces with microscopic precision.

02

The Precision Gear Train

Energy travels from the mainspring barrel through a series of interlocking, hand-bevelled gears. Each tooth profile is cut to tolerances of less than 2 microns, ensuring frictionless transmission.

03

Jeweled Pivots

Twenty-five synthetic ruby bearings serve as friction-free points of contact for the rapidly spinning gear pivots, securing oil pools and guaranteeing that the mechanism retains its precision for decades.

COLLECTIONS

Select Your Masterpiece

01 / HERITAGE

Heritage Calibre

Classic styling. Hand-polished 18K gold case, premium hand-stitched alligator leather strap, and traditional guilloché dial.

Gold 18K Automatic 40mm
02 / HORIZON

Horizon Minimal

Modern architectural minimalism. Grade 5 sandblasted titanium casing, double curved sapphire, and integrated bracelet.

Titanium Manual-wind 41mm
03 / ECLIPSE

Eclipse Chrono

Bold and aggressive. Deep-black zirconium oxide ceramic case, fully skeletonized movement, and rubber-lined strap.

Ceramic Chronograph 42mm
04 / ASTRUM

Astrum Tourbillon

Our flagship complication. Floating flying tourbillon, 120-hour power reserve indicator, and limited platinum production.

Platinum Tourbillon 43mm

MATERIALS

Engineered Without Compromise

  • Sapphire Crystal Vickers hardness of 2,000, virtually scratchproof. Coated with double anti-reflective layers for perfect clarity.
  • Grade 5 Titanium Biocompatible, high strength-to-weight ratio, and highly resistant to corrosion. Finished with a satin-brushed luster.
  • 18K Swiss Gold A proprietary alloy formulation that resists discoloration over decades, casting a rich, warm light reflection.
  • Zirconium Ceramic Sintered at 1500°C and diamond-polished. Highly scratch-resistant and silky smooth to the touch.

METRICS

Tested Beyond Limits

120h
Power Reserve
±2s
Daily Accuracy
300
Pieces Per Year

ACQUISITION

The Experience Journey

1

Private Consultation

A dedicated curator hosts a personal consultation at one of our private lounges to discuss collections and custom configurations.

2

Watch Customization

Choose gold type, bezel polishing style, hand finishes, and customize the engraving on the movement bridge.

3

Hand Assembly

A single dedicated master watchmaker oversees the entire build process, hand-decorating plates and oiling pivots.

4

Secure Delivery

Each timepiece is hand-delivered globally via a bonded courier in a climate-controlled presentation box made of walnut.

5

Lifetime Service

Included 10-year warranty followed by concierge maintenance, polishing, and restoration services for generations.

OWNERS

"AETERNA is not an instrument of time, but a container of patience. When you look at the escapement beat, you understand what time is truly made of."

— Collector, Zurich

Own More Than Time

Begin your private journey with AETERNA today.
